methods.description: Process for testing significant differences in the content of solid phase nutrients using pair-wise t tests.

steps.description: Significant differences in the content of solid phase nutrients were tested by pair-wise t tests.
steps.searchable_summary: perform pair-wise t tests to compare nutrient content

methods.description: Estimation of average nutrient efflux rates by dividing time-integrated nutrient effluxes by the experiment duration.

steps.description: Average nutrient efflux rates were estimated as time-integrated nutrient effluxes divided by the experiment duration.

methods.description: Comparison of trends of time-integrated effluxes between treatments using regression models with temperature as a covariate.

steps.description: To compare the trends of the time-integrated effluxes between −OM and +OM treatments along temperature we did regression models considering temperature the continuous covariate and OM enrichment as a fixed factor.
steps.searchable_summary: perform regression analysis with temperature as covariate

steps.description: We hypothesized different regression models based on the trends of the time-integrated effluxes with increasing temperature.
We used the second order Akaike Information Criterion (AICc) to choose the best model.
steps.searchable_summary: select best regression model using AICc

methods.description: Testing the significance of regression coefficients using ANOVA.

steps.description: The significance of the regression coefficients was tested by ANOVA.
steps.searchable_summary: test regression coefficient significance using ANOVA
